story_arc.title: 휴가 모드
story_arc.theme_ko: K-Pop, Tropical House, 124 BPM, 124 BPM, hopeful mood에 맞춘 곡별 애니메이션 뮤직비디오
story_arc.logline_ko: '휴가 모드'는 petite soft-faced protagonist with a compact frame and gentle rounded features, male-presenting one human lead character, bright vacation anime lead carrying release and summer warmth through the hook, face structure: long oval face, high cheekbones, narrow eyes, straight nose, song-specific face detail: faint under-eye shadows and a sharp lower-lash line, signature gesture: keeps one hand near the collar when holding back words가 sunlit wave arcs and coral orange shell glints marking release from routine를 따라가며 sunlit shoreline road with warm sea breeze, open beach deck near bright water, small seaside bus stop in golden afternoon를 통과하는 tropical vacation anime pop MV입니다.
story_arc.story_summary_ko: 이 뮤직비디오는 고정된 색상톤은 유지하되, 장면과 캐릭터는 'K-Pop, Tropical House, 124 BPM'의 리듬, 124 BPM의 속도감, 섹션별 가사와 감정 변화에 맞춰 전개됩니다. 반복 상징은 sunlit wave arcs and coral orange shell glints marking release from routine이며, 각 장면은 같은 주인공을 유지하면서도 장소, 행동, 카메라, 영상 움직임을 다르게 설계합니다.

acts.name: opening
acts.purpose_ko: 곡의 사운드 질감, 주인공, 핵심 상징을 소개합니다.

acts.name: development
acts.purpose_ko: 벌스와 프리코러스의 가사 정서를 행동과 공간 변화로 보여줍니다.

acts.name: climax
acts.purpose_ko: 코러스와 브리지에서 BPM과 에너지에 맞춰 카메라와 빛의 강도를 높입니다.

acts.name: resolution
acts.purpose_ko: 마지막 가사와 잔향에 맞춰 상징을 정리하고 다음 감정으로 닫습니다.

continuity_rules: 한 곡 안에서는 같은 주인공, 같은 의상, 같은 대표 소품을 유지합니다.
곡이 바뀌면 장르, BPM, 가사, 분위기에 맞춰 새 주인공과 새 소품을 생성합니다.
색상톤은 유지합니다: limited-color anime palette: coral orange dominant, dark shadows, near-black backgrounds, soft rose-gold secondary glow, bright white and luminous highlights.
각 섹션은 가사, 섹션 설명, 강도, BPM에 따라 다른 장소, 행동, 카메라 움직임을 가져야 합니다.

visual_world.transition_language: beat-matched impact cuts and fast reflection wipes through sunlit wave arcs and coral orange shell glints marking release from routine, rose gold reflections, and tropical percussion sparkle, warm bass pulse, sea-breeze motion, polished K-pop brightness

protagonist.identity: petite soft-faced protagonist with a compact frame and gentle rounded features, male-presenting one human lead character, bright vacation anime lead carrying release and summer warmth through the hook, face structure: long oval face, high cheekbones, narrow eyes, straight nose, song-specific face detail: faint under-eye shadows and a sharp lower-lash line, signature gesture: keeps one hand near the collar when holding back words
protagonist.hair: straight dark hair falling past the shoulders, one longer side strand crossing the cheek, single coral orange identity accent only, placed exactly as described
protagonist.outfit: soft cardigan-like coat with loose scarf layers, single shoulder patch shaped by the song motif, tiny earring on one ear catching the key light
protagonist.silhouette: tall narrow body silhouette with long legs
protagonist.signature_prop: small sunlit shell charm catching coral-orange light
protagonist.accent_detail: coral orange remains dominant, but the prop and gestures follow this song motif: sunlit wave arcs and coral orange shell glints marking release from routine. This exact face structure, body silhouette, hair shape, outfit category, accessory, and gesture set belong only to '휴가 모드'. Avoid generic dark-haired anime boy sameness; preserve the exact song-specific identity lock
consistency_rules: Keep the same face, hairstyle, outfit, body proportions, and signature prop within this song only.
Primary subject type: human_solo (one human lead character); gender presentation: male-presenting.
Do not reuse this character design for a different song unless the user explicitly requests a series identity.
Avoid generic dark-haired anime boy sameness; preserve the exact song-specific identity lock.
Do not average this character into a generic dark-haired anime protagonist; prioritize the face structure, body silhouette, hair base, and outfit base.
Let pose, expression, setting, and action change per section according to lyrics, genre, intensity, and BPM.
Use anime cinematic styling, never live-action realism.
First generate Step 00 (character turnaround model sheet) before creating any scene image.
Attach that same character model sheet when generating every scene image for this song.
Attach the final scene image as the primary image-to-video reference when generating the video for that scene.
reference_workflow: Generate a clean song-specific character turnaround model sheet before scene production.
Use the same model sheet as an input/reference for every scene image prompt in this song.
After each scene image is approved, use that scene image as the primary image-to-video input with the matching video prompt.
When possible, include the model sheet as a secondary reference during video generation to protect character identity.
required_reference_views: prop close-up of small sunlit shell charm catching coral-orange light
gender/subject check: male-presenting one human lead character

character_model_sheet.purpose: Generate this song-specific character turnaround model sheet before any scene image.
character_model_sheet.character_reference_prompt:
# Character Turnaround Model Sheet Prompt

Create the master character turnaround model sheet for this song. This model sheet will be attached as the identity reference for every later scene image, and optionally as a secondary reference for video generation.

Identity requirement: create a visibly new primary subject for this song, not a reused design, not a costume variation, not the same face with different clothes. If the subject is not human, do not force a full-body human character; keep the object/environment as the main subject.

Required views:
- front full-body view
- left side full-body view
- right side full-body view
- back full-body view
- three-quarter full-body view
- face close-up
- prop close-up of small sunlit shell charm catching coral-orange light
- gender/subject check: male-presenting one human lead character

Character design: petite soft-faced protagonist with a compact frame and gentle rounded features, male-presenting one human lead character, bright vacation anime lead carrying release and summer warmth through the hook, face structure: long oval face, high cheekbones, narrow eyes, straight nose, song-specific face detail: faint under-eye shadows and a sharp lower-lash line, signature gesture: keeps one hand near the collar when holding back words, anime character, stylized and non-photorealistic, straight dark hair falling past the shoulders, one longer side strand crossing the cheek, single coral orange identity accent only, placed exactly as described, soft cardigan-like coat with loose scarf layers, single shoulder patch shaped by the song motif, tiny earring on one ear catching the key light, tall narrow body silhouette with long legs. Signature prop: small sunlit shell charm catching coral-orange light. Accent detail: coral orange remains dominant, but the prop and gestures follow this song motif: sunlit wave arcs and coral orange shell glints marking release from routine. This exact face structure, body silhouette, hair shape, outfit category, accessory, and gesture set belong only to '휴가 모드'. Avoid generic dark-haired anime boy sameness; preserve the exact song-specific identity lock. Visual world: tropical vacation anime pop within vivid idol anime with high-clarity accent palette.

Composition: clean anime production model sheet, neutral simple background, aligned character views at the same scale, full body visible from head to toe in each turnaround pose, clear face close-up, clear hairstyle silhouette, clear outfit seams, clear signature prop, no dramatic camera angle, no cropped limbs, no environmental scene, no action pose. limited-color anime palette: coral orange dominant, dark shadows, near-black backgrounds, soft rose-gold secondary glow, bright white and luminous highlights. Non-photorealistic, no live action, no text, no watermark.

Consistency rules:
- Keep the same face, hairstyle, outfit, body proportions, and signature prop within this song only.
- Primary subject type: human_solo (one human lead character); gender presentation: male-presenting.
- Do not reuse this character design for a different song unless the user explicitly requests a series identity.
- Avoid generic dark-haired anime boy sameness; preserve the exact song-specific identity lock.
- Do not average this character into a generic dark-haired anime protagonist; prioritize the face structure, body silhouette, hair base, and outfit base.
- Let pose, expression, setting, and action change per section according to lyrics, genre, intensity, and BPM.
- Use anime cinematic styling, never live-action realism.
- First generate Step 00 (character turnaround model sheet) before creating any scene image.
- Attach that same character model sheet when generating every scene image for this song.
- Attach the final scene image as the primary image-to-video reference when generating the video for that scene.

Production workflow:
- Generate a clean song-specific character turnaround model sheet before scene production.
- Use the same model sheet as an input/reference for every scene image prompt in this song.
- After each scene image is approved, use that scene image as the primary image-to-video input with the matching video prompt.
- When possible, include the model sheet as a secondary reference during video generation to protect character identity.
required_views: prop close-up of small sunlit shell charm catching coral-orange light
gender/subject check: male-presenting one human lead character
usage: Attach this model sheet as the identity reference for every scene image prompt in this song.
Use each generated scene image as the primary image-to-video reference.
If the video tool supports multiple references, attach this model sheet as a secondary video reference.
